---
title: "Week 12"
---

::: {style="color: #F66D7A"}
### Monday (5/04)
:::

**Topics**

-   Inequalities

**Daily assignment**

To be completed and submitted to Canvas by 9:00am

-   [Daily assignment](daily/DA_32.pdf) (last one!)

**Class activity**

-   [Inequalities worksheet](class/CA_32.pdf)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: {style="color: #F66D7A"}
### Wednesday (5/06)
:::

**Topics**

-   Law of Large Numbers!

**Class activity**

-   Code and plots for LLN and MC integration

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: {style="color: #F66D7A"}
### Friday (5/07)
:::

**Topics**

-   Central Limit Theorem!
-   CRFs

**Class activity**

-   Plot for CLT demo
